prompt: Prove the three sorry exercises in Section_4_4.lean: Nat.no_infinite_descent, Nat.even_or_odd'', and Nat.not_even_and_odd

assertions.name: no_infinite_descent_proved
assertions.check: The sorry for Nat.no_infinite_descent is replaced with a valid tactic proof

assertions.name: even_or_odd_proved
assertions.check: The sorry for Nat.even_or_odd'' is replaced with a valid tactic proof

assertions.name: not_even_and_odd_proved
assertions.check: The sorry for Nat.not_even_and_odd is replaced with a valid tactic proof

assertions.name: builds_without_errors
assertions.check: build_log.txt shows zero errors (sorry warnings for OTHER exercises are OK)

assertions.name: proofs_concise
assertions.check: Each proof body is at most 10 tactic lines
